market_context: Volatile tape: CPI back above 4% with rate-hike fears, Iran-Israel truce looking fragile, and China-Taiwan tensions pressuring semiconductors; Nasdaq 100 swung -3%/+2%/-3% over the past week. Portfolio holds no positions, so deployment is deliberately minimal. All news today came through a single aggregator (Benzinga), capping conviction at 0.7 per the two-independent-sources rule. One concrete catalyst cluster on JNJ; everything else defaults to hold.

signals.thesis: Defensive healthcare with three concrete catalysts this week: UK MHRA authorization of nipocalimab, $1B all-cash Firefly Bio acquisition expanding the pipeline, and positive icotyde psoriasis-pill commentary at the Goldman healthcare conference. Falsified if talc/mesothelioma litigation escalates beyond the $32M LA verdict or if the new-approval revenue narrative stalls by next earnings.
sources: Benzinga 2026-06-09: Johnson & Johnson's Nipocalimab Gets U.K. MHRA Authorization
Benzinga 2026-06-08: Johnson & Johnson To Acquire Firefly Bio For $1B In All-Cash Deal
Benzinga 2026-06-09: JNJ Executive At Goldman Sachs Healthcare Conference On Psoriasis Pill Icotyde

signals.thesis: Post-WWDC AI reveal read as a win for partners rather than AAPL itself; stock -6.0% over 5 sessions amid the macro selloff. No falsifiable edge in either direction from a single-source news day.
sources: Benzinga 2026-06-10: Apple's AI Reveal Hands An Unexpected Win To Google, NVIDIA

signals.thesis: Xbox layoffs and a -7.1% five-session slide reflect macro rate fears more than a thesis-grade deterioration; no position to defend and no entry edge while the tape is swinging 3% daily.
sources: Benzinga 2026-06-10: Xbox Plans Significant Layoffs as It Transforms Under New CEO (Bloomberg via Benzinga)

signals.thesis: China-Taiwan tensions are a direct supply-chain overhang on semis and high-profile short interest is being publicized; GTC Taipei robotaxi news is real but not enough to buy into geopolitical risk. Stay flat.
sources: Benzinga 2026-06-10: Michael Burry's NVDA, PLTR Shorts Are Paying Off

signals.thesis: Flat week (-0.8% over 5 sessions) with mixed news: open-model releases and an Apple-AI halo versus an adverse ruling letting the youth social-media addiction case proceed. No actionable edge today.
sources: Benzinga 2026-06-10: California Judge Denies Google And Meta Motions In Youth Social Media Addiction Case

signals.thesis: Strong momentum (+8.1% over 5 sessions, near 52w high) but today's supporting news is analyst price-target raises, which this desk ignores by rule. Healthcare exposure is already being added via JNJ; doubling the sector bet on PT chatter is not justified.
sources: Benzinga 2026-06-08: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on UnitedHealth (price-target chatter, excluded by rule)
